Signal Intelligence for Sales Teams

See every company using your competitor's tools

Start warm outreach based on real signals

Limited early access · Book a demo to get started

The old way vs. the new way

Cold outreach is broken. Signals fix it.

Cold outreach

  • Buy a list of 10,000 random companies
  • Send the same email to everyone
  • Hope someone happens to need you
  • 1–3% response rate on a good day

~1%

Average response rate

Signal-based outreach

  • Search for companies using a competitor
  • See real signals: job posts + reviews
  • Reach out with context that resonates
  • Dramatically higher reply rates

5–15×

Higher reply rates with context

247M+

Job postings scanned

50+

SaaS tools covered

Weekly

Data refresh cadence

How it works

Three steps to warmer outreach

01

Search a competitor's tool

Type in any SaaS product — HubSpot, Salesforce, Notion, Linear, whatever your prospect might already be using.

$ search --tool "HubSpot"
Scanning job postings...
Parsing G2 reviews...
Cross-referencing Capterra...
02

Get a verified company list

We surface companies with real evidence — a job description mentioning the tool, or a review from one of their employees.

Found 247 companies using HubSpot
 
→ Acme Corp (4 signals)
→ TechFlow Inc (2 signals)
→ GrowthLab (3 signals)
→ ... 244 more
03

Reach out with real context

Know exactly what tools your prospect uses before you send a single word. Reference their stack, address their pain points, close more deals.

Hey Sarah,
 
Saw Acme is hiring for a
"HubSpot admin" role — sounds
like you're scaling fast.
 
We help teams like yours...

Signal sources

Where we find the signals

Companies reveal their tech stack constantly — in the jobs they post and the reviews they write. We read all of it so you don't have to.

Job Postings

Greenhouse · Lever · Ashby · Workable

Job descriptions are goldmines. When a company hires for "Salesforce Admin" or lists "HubSpot experience required", they're telling you exactly what they use.

Sales Operations Manager

Vertex Systems

SalesforceHubSpot

"...3+ years of experience with Salesforce CRM. Familiarity with HubSpot is a plus..."

Sr. Software Engineer

Orbit CRM

LinearNotion

"...our stack includes Linear for project tracking and Notion for documentation..."

Head of Growth

Meridian SaaS

IntercomMixpanel

"...you'll own our Intercom setup and work with Mixpanel for funnel analytics..."

Reviews & Community

G2 · Capterra · Reddit · Product Hunt

When employees write reviews or discuss tools online, they name the products they use. We parse these mentions to confirm adoption — and sometimes catch who's unhappy with a competitor.

G2

VP of Sales, TechFlow Inc

HubSpot

"We've been using HubSpot for 2 years. The CRM is solid but the reporting is..."

Reddit

r/salesforce · 234 upvotes

SalesforcePipedrive

"Anyone else migrating from Salesforce to Pipedrive? We just finished the switch and..."

Capterra

Operations Lead, GrowthLab

Monday.comSlack

"Switched to Monday.com after trying Asana and Jira. The integrations with Slack are..."

Pricing

Starting at $49/mo

Book a demo to see TTMD in action — then choose the plan that fits your team.

Starter

For founders doing focused outreach.

$49/per month
  • 100 tool searches per month
  • Full company lists per search
  • Job posting + UGC signals
  • CSV export
  • Signal date & freshness indicators
  • Email support

Growth

Popular

For sales teams running outreach at scale.

$149/per month
  • Unlimited searches
  • Unlimited company results
  • All signal sources
  • Bulk CSV export
  • CRM webhook (HubSpot / Pipedrive)
  • Priority support & onboarding

All plans require a demo first. Cancel anytime, no long-term contracts.
